channel.title: Dlt on Lough on Data
channel.description: Recent content in Dlt on Lough on Data

item.title: Building a Dream-Job Radar, Part 2: The Build
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: The follow-up to Part 1. I built the dream-job radar — a small dlt pipeline that watches a hand-picked list of outdoor, geospatial, and forestry companies for new roles, writes Parquet to Cloudflare R2, and surfaces everything in a MotherDuck Dive I check on my phone. Here’s how it works, what changed from the original plan, and what I deliberately left naive.

item.title: Building a Dream-Job Radar
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: On a dog-walk conversation with Claude that surfaced a role I would have otherwise missed — and the small dlt → S3 → MotherDuck pipeline I’m building so it doesn’t happen again.

item.title: Databox
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A single-operator data platform that ingests eBird, NOAA, and USGS into one queryable warehouse — built to answer whether species distributions shift with same-day weather and streamflow anomalies.

item.title: Data Saturday #52 — Oslo
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: Session notes from Data Saturday #52 in Oslo: tools that came up, Roche’s Maxim, testing in the dev cycle, data mesh, and turning data into influence.

item.title: dlt Demo: Bird Hotspot Finder, pt. II
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: Extending the dlt pipeline: stage load packages to S3, persist schema changes back to DuckDB, and ping Slack on schema drift.

item.title: dlt Demo: Bird Hotspot Finder, pt. I
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: Loading eBird API data into DuckDB with dlt, then querying it in DBeaver. A first look at dlt as a Meltano/Airbyte alternative.
